# RadCrew

> RadCrew is a lean software development agency of three senior engineers building
> full-stack web products, Web3 systems on EVM and Solana, and AI features from
> prototype to production. Contact: code@radcrew.org

RadCrew ("RadCrew Unveiled") is a small, senior development agency. The crew is
three engineers: a lead who owns architecture and delivery, a Web3/AI specialist
focused on smart contracts and chains, and a full-stack/AI engineer who ties
interfaces, backends, and models together. They partner with teams who want
velocity without sacrificing quality. The website (https://radcrew.org) is a
single-page site with a built-in FAQ chatbot.

## What we do

- **Full-stack product engineering**: Web apps, APIs, dashboards, and
  integrations—from greenfield MVPs to hardening production systems. TypeScript-first,
  cloud-ready, built for maintainability.
- **Web3 on EVM & Solana**: Smart contracts, wallets, indexing, and protocol UX.
  Shipping on Ethereum and L2s, plus Solana when a product needs speed,
  composability, or cross-chain clarity.
- **AI in the real product**: LLM features, agents, RAG, and evaluation—not demos.
  Connecting models to your data, auth, and stack so AI ships with the rest of the
  product.

## How we work

A four-phase rhythm from first call to production and beyond:

1. **Discover** — align on outcomes, constraints, and risk; propose a thin slice to
   validate architecture and UX early.
2. **Build** — short cycles with visible progress: trunk-based flow, reviews, and
   demos.
3. **Ship** — hardening, observability, and handoff-ready docs; care about launch
   day and the week after.
4. **Partner** — stay for a phase-two roadmap or transition cleanly; knowledge
   lives in the repo and runbooks.

## Representative work

Examples of the kinds of problems RadCrew takes from idea to production (illustrative
of capability areas, not an exhaustive client list): multi-chain DeFi analytics,
enterprise RAG assistants, Solana trading experiences, NFT creator tooling,
cross-chain bridge/relayer ops dashboards, AI support copilots, realtime
collaboration SaaS, mobile Web3 wallets, ML pipeline observability, DAO governance
portals, and B2B API platforms.

## Contact

- Email: code@radcrew.org (typical response within one to two business days)
- Website: https://radcrew.org
